title: daka' #1792
definition:
1) to crush, be crushed, be contrite, be broken
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to be crushed
        1a2) to be contrite (fig.)
    1b) (Piel) to crush
    1c) (Pual)
        1c1) to be crushed, be shattered
        1c2) to be made contrite
    1d) (Hithpael) to allow oneself to be crushed
